item.description: Tad Sommerville signed up to testify Con.

item.description: Floor amendment(s) adopted.

item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.

item.title: First reading, referred to Housing.
item.description: First reading, referred to Housing.

item.title: 👍Benjamin Maritz - Washington State Department of Health
item.description: Benjamin Maritz signed up to testify Pro.

item.title: 👍💵Jeff Paul - House Our Neighbors
item.description: Jeff Paul signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent House Our Neighbors. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Mike Eliason - Seattle Social Housing
item.description: Mike Eliason signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Seattle Social Housing.

item.title: HSG - Majority; do pass.
item.description: HSG - Majority; do pass.

item.description: Minority; without recommendation.
